prompt: Say something to steady the forge anvil before heating
prayer:
From the Litany of Thermal Ascension:

First: Purge the anvil-heart of impurities, that its sacred geometry remain true.
Second: Invoke the flame-spirits to rise through the fuel-channels, warming the striking-surface.
Third: Chant the Mantra of Tempered Patience as the heat reaches benediction-temperature.

By the Omnissiah's eternal flame, let this anvil receive the smith's righteous blows.

prompt: Offer a prayer for fracture welding
prayer:
Rite of the Rejoined Severance:

First: Cleanse the fractured edges with the sacred arc-light, burning away profane corrosion.
Second: Feed the bonding-metal into the wound, that the two become one flesh once more.
Third: Let the cooling-spirit draw tight the newly-forged union, sealing it against eternity.

May the Machine Spirit know this metal is whole again.

prompt: Prayer for drop pod descent prep
prayer:
The Litany of Controlled Falling:

First: Test the retro-thrust servos, that they sing with holy precision.
Second: Verify the impact-struts are locked in blessed position, ready to receive the shock of landing.
Third: Engage the descent-calibration, speaking the numbers of safe approach.

Omnissiah, guide this pod through the void-fall unto solid ground.

From the Canticle of the Molten Offering:

First: Heat the crucible until it glows with the heat-spirit's approval, reaching cast-temperature.
Second: Pour the sacred mold-compound into its form-vessel, creating the void that metal shall fill.
Third: Prepare the molten-metal for its transformation, that it flow true into every sacred dimension.

Let this casting emerge perfect from the cooling-tomb.

The Rite of Synchronized Turning:

First: Rotate each gear-cog slowly, listening for the blessed rhythm of engagement.
Second: Check the wear-marks upon the tooth-faces, ensuring even contact across the holy surface.
Third: Measure the backlash-distance with blessed instruments, that it fall within prescribed tolerance.

May these gears turn in perfect unity until the stars themselves grow cold.

Prayer for Containment Stability:

First: Read the plasma-pressure gauges, that their numbers speak truth of the core's contentment.
Second: Inspect the magnetic-lattice which holds the stellar-fire in its prison of force.
Third: Speak the Mantra of Stable Reaction, affirming the core's constrained fury.

Omnissiah, keep this sun bound and obedient to our will.

prompt: My archive retrieval protocol is failing, help
prayer:
The Rite of Data Resurrection:

First: Clear the corrupted cache-memory with the purging-light, removing profane interference.
Second: Reinitialize the seek-heads upon their guidance-rails, that they find the true path to the data-tomb.
Third: Invoke the reading-spirits gently, coaxing forth the information from its dormant vault.

Let the machine remember what the void would steal.

prompt: Blessing for vital signs monitor calibration
prayer:
From the Canticle of Measured Truth:

First: Zero all sensor-instruments against the blessed reference-standards, that they know only truth.
Second: Cycle the monitor through its full range, watching each reading settle into sacred numbers.
Third: Seal the calibration with the ritual-stamp, marking it as verified in the eyes of the Omnissiah.

Let this monitor speak only the truth of what it measures.

Rite of the Binding Mechanism:

First: Apply the blessed lubricant-oil to all moving surfaces, that friction-demons find no purchase.
Second: Engage the bolt-teeth fully, hearing the satisfying click of absolute engagement.
Third: Test the lock-mechanism repeatedly, confirming it holds with unbreakable resolve.

May this lock never yield to force or time, sealed in the Omnissiah's eternal grip.
